device_name: EFAI Neurosuite CT Midline Shift Assessment System (MLS-CT-100)
intended_use: EFAI NEUROSUITE CT MIDLINE SHIFT ASSESSMENT SYSTEM (EFAI MLSCT) is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of non-contrast head CT cases with features suggesti
intended_use_full: EFAI NEUROSUITE CT MIDLINE SHIFT ASSESSMENT SYSTEM (EFAI MLSCT) is a software workflow tool designed to aid in prioritizing the clinical assessment of non-contrast head CT cases with features suggestive of midline shift (MLS) in individuals aged 18 years and above. EFAI MLSCT analyzes cases using deep learning algorithms to identify suspected MLS findings. It makes case-level output available to a PACS/workstation for worklist prioritization or triage.
target_condition: Midline shift (MLS) in non-contrast head CT
ground_truth: Reference standard (ground truth) generated by majority agreement between three U.S. board-certified radiologists who independently assessed the presence of MLS in each case
other_metrics: System processing time per study: 62.04 seconds (95% CI=60.65-63.44)
